# Sigvardsson Consulting Group

> Sigvardsson Consulting Group (SCG) is a Nordic retail management consultancy and implementation house combining 30+ years of retail experience, proprietary AI-driven software, and official Link Retail partnership. Three-time Global 100 Winner (2024, 2025, 2026). We help Nordic retail chains lift profitability through measurable, data-driven projects — not reports.

SCG operates across Sweden, Norway, Denmark and Finland with 100+ completed retail projects at leading Nordic chains including NorgesGruppen Kiwi, NorgesGruppen Meny, Coop, XL Bygg, Toys 'R' Us, Travel Retail Norway, XXL Sport & Villmark, Heinermann Group, Ultimate Padel, and Elgiganten. Headquarters: Stockholm, Sweden. CEO & Founder: Per Sigvardsson.

The site is bilingual (Swedish primary, English secondary). All URLs serve both languages via client-side language toggle.

## Core positioning

- **Implementation house, not a traditional consultancy.** Three capabilities under one roof: retail experience, proprietary software, technology partnership.
- **Concrete work, not reports.** Typical projects deliver 4–15% sales growth at shelf level, 10–20% margin growth via placement optimization, 30% food waste reduction, 6–9% cost reduction in queue management.
- **Start small, measure, scale.** Build lasting capability in the client organization rather than dependency.

## Key services

- [Retail Strategy](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/retail-strategi/): Strategic advisory built on 30+ years of retail experience, including AI inventory and roadmap.
- [Change Management](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/change-management/): Profitability turnaround and margin growth programs with organizational change.
- [SWOT & Business Analysis](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/swot-affarsanalys/): Root-cause diagnosis for underperforming retail businesses.
- [Process Development](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/processutveckling/): Scalable retail operations and internal processes.
- [Implementation](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/implementering/): Hands-on rollout of tools, systems, and ways of working.
- [Training](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/utbildning/): Retail education and capability building at all organizational levels.
- [RFID](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/rfid/): RFID inventory and loss-prevention solutions.
- [Digital Pricing](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/digital-prissattning/): Electronic shelf labels and dynamic pricing.
- [Self-service Kiosks](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/kiosk-sjalvbetjaning/): In-store kiosks and self-checkout.
- [Video Analytics](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/video-analytics/): CCTV-based customer flow heatmaps.
- [Video Shelf Analytics](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/video-shelf-analytics/): Shelf-level customer engagement measurement.
- [NPS Customer Analytics](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/nps-kundanalys/): AI-driven NPS analysis turning open responses into action.

## Retail optimization products

- [Perfekt hylla (Perfect Shelf)](https://www.sigvardsson.org/products/perfekt-hylla/): Flagship AI-driven shelf optimization with minimum 2% sales-growth guarantee. Three implementation levels from POS-only to full photo-recognition. Typical effect: 4–15% sales growth. Reference clients: NorgesGruppen Kiwi, Meny, Coop.
- [Perfekt varuplacering (Perfect Placement)](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/perfekt-varuplacering/): Shelf-position optimization. Typical effect: 10–20% margin growth.
- [Perfekt kampanj (Perfect Campaign)](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/perfekt-kampanj/): Campaign mix and placement optimization. Typical effect: 12–18% sales growth.
- [Perfekt kundflöde (Perfect Customer Flow)](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/perfekt-kundflode/): CCTV-based customer flow analytics. Typical effect: 4–15% sales growth.
- [Perfekt kö (Perfect Queue)](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/perfekt-ko/): Real-time queue prediction and prevention. Typical effect: 6–9% cost reduction.
- [Minimera Matsvinnet (Minimize Food Waste)](https://www.sigvardsson.org/services/tjanster/minimera-matsvinnet/): Real-time forecasting for bread and produce. Typical effect: 30% waste reduction.

## Software products

- [Retail Apps](https://www.sigvardsson.org/products/retail-apps/): Suite of 9 mobile-first apps for in-store optimization.
- [Feedback App](https://www.sigvardsson.org/products/feedback-app/): Real-time customer satisfaction measurement with NPS analytics and KPI correlation. Reference clients: XL Bygg, Toys 'R' Us.
- [Saldo4](https://www.sigvardsson.org/products/saldo4/): Data-driven inventory management with daily action lists. Reduces working capital, increases stock turn.

## Technology partnership

- [Link Retail](https://www.sigvardsson.org/products/link-retail/): SCG is Link Retail's official partner in Sweden. Link Retail operates in 25+ countries with food waste management, video analytics, and space management solutions.

## Insights articles (knowledge base)

- [AI börjar i sökrutan — men slutar i din kapitalbindning (2026-05-14)](https://www.sigvardsson.org/insights/ai-strategi-retail-2026/): Per Sigvardsson on AI's three-pillar strategic impact in retail — shelf optimization, customer listening, and working capital. 6 min read.
- [Hyllan står för 75 procent av din omsättning (2026-05-13)](https://www.sigvardsson.org/insights/hyllan-75-procent/): Per Sigvardsson on the shelf as the dominant revenue driver and how to optimize it. 5 min read.
- [Matsvinn: 30 procents minskning är inte längre hjältevärde (2026)](https://www.sigvardsson.org/insights/matsvinn-30-procent/): Peter Wilén on food waste as a profitability issue. 4 min read.
- [NPS är inte en siffra — det är ett ärendesystem](https://www.sigvardsson.org/insights/nps-arendesystem/): How AI turns NPS measurement into operational action.
- [Lagret är ett beslut — inte en konsekvens](https://www.sigvardsson.org/insights/lagret-ar-ett-beslut/): Lars Lundqvist on working-capital reduction through AI forecasting.

## Team

- **Per Sigvardsson** — CEO & Founder. Led 100+ Nordic retail projects. Former CEO at several major Nordic retail chains. Link Retail's official partner in Sweden.
- **Lars Lundqvist** — Senior Partner. Operations expert. Originator of Saldo4.
- **Peter Wilén** — Senior Partner. Training, development, sustainability, and food waste.
- **Sebastian Fauné** — Consultant.
- **Emil Sigvardsson** — Consultant.
- **Felix Johansson** — Consultant.
